title: Jonathan Davis

{{Top|rwp|notoc=1}} {{Person |image=[[File:JonathanDavis.jpg]] |name=Jonathan Davis |birth= |death= |listedpronouns= |nationality= |occupation=[[Wikipedia:Voice acting|Voice artist]]{{WebCite|url=https://www.audiofilemagazine.com/narrators/jonathan-davis|text=Spotlight on Narrator Jonathan Davis|work=[[Wikipedia:AudioFile (magazine)|''AudioFile'']]|archivedate=20240714113806}} |companies= |website= }} {{Quote|These were solo narrations with sound effects, my favorites being Dark Renezvous and Dark Lord. Luckily, among the 30 I did, there wasn't a Chewbacca story. His 'voice' would have been a real challenge!|Jonathan Davis talking with AudioFile magazine|}} '''Jonathan Davis''' is a [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] who has narrated the audiobooks for many ''[[Star Wars]]'' novels. {{Bio-stub}} ==Works== ===Discography=== {|{{Prettytable}} !
